case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. JOSE ANTONIO LOPEZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,064.71 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE AT APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE ANTONIO LOPEZ GARCIA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO $1,749.61 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,974.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/28/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ GARCIA, JOSE ANTONIO
